## Meeting Purpose

[Sync between Marcel (GrowthX) and Mindaugas (The Backchannel) to discuss potential job opportunity and company vision.](https://fathom.video/share/XBeYVgRVxvsZiPUvxQgu2ABaSVYYxxJZ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Both GrowthX and Lovable have made compelling offers to Mindaugas, presenting him with a challenging decision](https://fathom.video/share/XBeYVgRVxvsZiPUvxQgu2ABaSVYYxxJZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)
  - [GrowthX is building an AI-powered workflow engine for content creation and knowledge work, with potential to expand into other domains](https://fathom.video/share/XBeYVgRVxvsZiPUvxQgu2ABaSVYYxxJZ?tab=summary&timestamp=687.0)
  - [Marcel emphasized GrowthX's approach to equity, prioritizing lower valuations and longer exercise periods to benefit employees](https://fathom.video/share/XBeYVgRVxvsZiPUvxQgu2ABaSVYYxxJZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1481.0)
  - [Mindaugas is optimizing for learning opportunities and applying his AI skills at scale, rather than prioritizing short-term compensation](https://fathom.video/share/XBeYVgRVxvsZiPUvxQgu2ABaSVYYxxJZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1568.0)

## Topics

### Personal Backgrounds and Career Journeys

  - [Mindaugas: Background in hospitality, recruitment, community building; spent last 2-3 years focused on AI, building projects and scaling content](https://fathom.video/share/XBeYVgRVxvsZiPUvxQgu2ABaSVYYxxJZ?tab=summary&timestamp=86.0)
  - [Marcel: Experience at IBM, HP, Scale.ai; built content platforms and AI-focused communities; now co-founder at GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/XBeYVgRVxvsZiPUvxQgu2ABaSVYYxxJZ?tab=summary&timestamp=314.0)

### GrowthX's Vision and Technology

  - [Building AI workflow engine for content creation and knowledge work](https://fathom.video/share/XBeYVgRVxvsZiPUvxQgu2ABaSVYYxxJZ?tab=summary&timestamp=687.0)
  - [Developed framework and runtime layer for various AI applications (e.g., Fact Checker)](https://fathom.video/share/XBeYVgRVxvsZiPUvxQgu2ABaSVYYxxJZ?tab=summary&timestamp=882.0)
  - [Focusing on capturing expert knowledge and workflows in reproducible ways](https://fathom.video/share/XBeYVgRVxvsZiPUvxQgu2ABaSVYYxxJZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1243.0)
  - [Potential to expand into web dev, design, and sales domains](https://fathom.video/share/XBeYVgRVxvsZiPUvxQgu2ABaSVYYxxJZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1874.0)

### Market Opportunity and Customer Demand

  - [Many companies are "clueless" about becoming AI-native, creating significant opportunity](https://fathom.video/share/XBeYVgRVxvsZiPUvxQgu2ABaSVYYxxJZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1389.0)
  - [Existing clients include Webflow, Abnormal Security, Ramp, and Reddit](https://fathom.video/share/XBeYVgRVxvsZiPUvxQgu2ABaSVYYxxJZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1368.0)
  - [Strong interest from potential clients in expanding services beyond content (e.g., web dev, design, sales)](https://fathom.video/share/XBeYVgRVxvsZiPUvxQgu2ABaSVYYxxJZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1879.0)

### Equity and Compensation Considerations

  - [Marcel shared insights on equity structures, emphasizing lower valuations to benefit employees](https://fathom.video/share/XBeYVgRVxvsZiPUvxQgu2ABaSVYYxxJZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1481.0)
  - [GrowthX aims for lower exercise costs and longer exercise periods (1 year standard, with potential extensions)](https://fathom.video/share/XBeYVgRVxvsZiPUvxQgu2ABaSVYYxxJZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1158.0)
  - [Cautioned against overvalued companies making it difficult for employees to benefit from equity](https://fathom.video/share/XBeYVgRVxvsZiPUvxQgu2ABaSVYYxxJZ?tab=summary&timestamp=2137.0)

### Decision-Making Process

  - [Mindaugas weighing offers from GrowthX and Lovable, both presenting exciting opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/XBeYVgRVxvsZiPUvxQgu2ABaSVYYxxJZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1923.0)
  - [Optimizing for learning and applying AI skills at scale, rather than short-term compensation](https://fathom.video/share/XBeYVgRVxvsZiPUvxQgu2ABaSVYYxxJZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1639.0)
  - [Considering potential for collaboration between GrowthX and Lovable](https://fathom.video/share/XBeYVgRVxvsZiPUvxQgu2ABaSVYYxxJZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1980.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Mindaugas to reflect on both offers and make a decision](https://fathom.video/share/XBeYVgRVxvsZiPUvxQgu2ABaSVYYxxJZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1923.0)
  - [Regardless of decision, Marcel and Mindaugas expressed interest in staying in touch and potentially collaborating](https://fathom.video/share/XBeYVgRVxvsZiPUvxQgu2ABaSVYYxxJZ?tab=summary&timestamp=2403.0)
  - [Explore possibility of Lovable becoming a customer of GrowthX, potentially allowing Mindaugas to work with both companies](https://fathom.video/share/XBeYVgRVxvsZiPUvxQgu2ABaSVYYxxJZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1940.0)
